hooks.command: f=$(grep -oE '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]*)"$/\1/'); case "$f" in *.cs|*.razor|*.csproj|*.sln) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; cd "C:/Users/vikto/OneDrive/Nod Coding Bootcamp/Github/Personal_Command_Hub" || exit 0; out=$("/c/Program Files/dotnet/dotnet.exe" build PCH.sln -nologo -clp:ErrorsOnly 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "PCH build FAILED after $f" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi
